name: Pasta with Crab Sauce
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Pasta cooked according to directions
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in olive oil over low heat.
2. Add shallot and celery, stirring until translucent.
3. Stir in tomato paste and tomato sauce; mix well.
4. Add the flavor cube and wine; cook for 5 minutes over low heat.
5. Stir in crab meat; cook an additional 5 minutes.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Serve hot over the prepared pasta.
